comment: Shorted premarket at ~7:30am EST when the 15-minute bar crossed below the 9 EMA
Right now the market is rewarding the pullback long and pullback short.
Good pullback buy, bouncing off the 9-hour EMA. Said around 10am EST.
In his short portfolio as of 3/4. Exact entry unknown, likely within the past week.
I very rarely buy opening range breakouts. There are too many fakeouts. I will wait until the 5 or 15 minute breakout.

For the gap up, I would treat it as an EP (episodic pivot). So if the gap up is above all the EMAs, above the resistance levels, above the previous high, above the AVWAP, then that is a good breakout. He normally looks at the 9, 21, and 50 EMAs.
If a stock gaps up at the opening, I will consider buying it. On the other hand, if it rises 5% intraday, I will definitely not buy it. It's too late.
If a stock gaps up but doesn't break its previous high, it probably needs more time.

Might be a good short because the market is bouncing up into resistance and this is one of the weakest names. Needs a couple more days to consolidate — it fell 30% and there are probably buyers stepping in. The bounce is a little too quick.
